highlights.title: Explore by Rewayat
highlights.description: Browse reciters by their narration style (Warsh, Qalon, etc.)

highlights.title: Your Playlists Section
highlights.description: Quick access to your playlists from the home screen

highlights.title: Fresh Content Every Session
highlights.description: Sections shuffle on each app open for variety

features: New 'Explore by Rewayat' section with 11 different rewayat types
Browse reciters filtered by narration style
Your Playlists section on home screen
Session-based shuffle for fresh content on each app open
Expanded collection to include downloaded reciters
New exclusive reciters: Malik Ahmad, Hani Alhussaini, Ayyub Asif, Abdulrahman Mosad
improvements: 'New to Quran' section now only shows for first 5 app opens
Removed 'Trending Now' section for cleaner layout
Reduced card spacing for tighter, more polished look
Smaller card sizes for better content density
Improved reciter collection with favorites, loved, and downloads
fixes: Fixed spacing issues between rewayat cards
technical: Implemented seeded shuffle for deterministic randomization
Extended BrowseReciters with initial filter props
Added playlist and rewayat card variants to RecitersView

highlights.title: Custom Playlists
highlights.description: Create and manage your own playlists

highlights.title: Redesigned Search
highlights.description: Beautiful bento layout with curated system playlists

features: Complete offline download system with progress tracking
Bulk download for playlists and collections
Create, edit, and manage custom playlists
Juz-based surah grouping in browse and reciter screens
Enhanced collection screen with rewayat-aware downloads
Download state indicators throughout the app
improvements: Eliminated navigation lag in explore view
Optimized button interactions across the app
Significant performance boost for main UI
Enhanced download performance to prevent freezing
fixes: Fixed download UI freezing during operations
